name: pixeloffice
description: PixelOffice — a multiplayer virtual office (presence, meetings, social interaction, team awareness)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.local: npm run build -w client && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run start -w server" "npm run preview -w client"
scripts.dev:poll: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run start -w server" "npm run dev:poll -w client"
